message:
fix(policy): use dedicated sequence counters instead of collection length for receipt/audit IDs

Replace self.receipts.len() and self.audit_log.len() with dedicated
monotonic sequence counters (next_receipt_seq, next_audit_seq) in
CompatGateEvaluator for generating receipt_id strings.

Using collection length as an ID is fragile: if entries are ever
removed, pruned, or if the ID is read before the entry is appended,
the counter-based approach produces IDs that never collide. Uses
wrapping_add for overflow safety.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
